zhCN: 招架已激活
enGB: Actively Parrying

zhCN: 你已架起防御。
enGB: Your guard is up.

enGB: Actively Counterattacking

enGB: Your guard is up.

zhCN: 额外武器专攻
enGB: Bonus Weapon Focus

zhCN: 专精于使用特定的武器。
enGB: Specialise in the use of a weapon.

zhCN: 攻击一个敌人，如果命中则恢复2点武技点
enGB: Attacks an enemy, if the attack hits restores 2 maneuver points.

zhCN: 武技专攻
enGB: Maneuver Focus

zhCN:
你的武技特别难以被人招架。
效果：你的所有武技的豁免DC+1
enGB:
Your maneuvers are particualarly hard to resist.
Benefit: Add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against your maneuvers.

zhCN: 武技专攻（神话）
enGB: Maneuver Focus (Mythic)

zhCN:
你的神话力量使你的武技更加难以被人招架。
效果：将你的神话等级加入武技豁免DC中。
enGB:
Your mythic power makes your maneuvers harder to resist.
Benefit: Increase the Difficulty Class for resisting your maneuvers by your Mythic Rank.

zhCN: 钢魄之威
enGB: Unnerving Calm

zhCN: 当你的钢魂击技命中时，你可以再次使用此击技。此外，你所有钢魂武技的豁免DC+1。
enGB: When you hit with a Diamond Mind strike you regain the use of that strike. In addition you add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against your Diamond Mind maneuvers.

zhCN: 铁心之佑
enGB: Iron Heart Aura

zhCN:
你的精神力量和武术训练激励着你周围的人。
效果：当你处于任何铁心战姿时，你周围20尺内的盟友（不包括你自己）豁免检定获得+2士气加值。此外，你所有铁心武技的豁免DC+1。
enGB:
Your strength of spirit and martial training inspires those around you.
Benefit: While you are in any Iron Heart stance, allies (not yourself) in a 20ft-circle around you gain +2 morale bonus to saving throws. In addition you add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against your Iron Heart maneuvers.

zhCN: 豁免检定获得+2士气加值。
enGB: +2 morale bonus to saving throws.

zhCN: 磐石之韧
enGB: Endurance of Stone

zhCN: 当你的石龙击技命中时，你恢复1d6点生命值。此外，你所有石龙武技的豁免DC+1。
enGB: When you hit with a Stone Dragon strike you heal for 1d6. In addition you add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against your Stone Dragon maneuvers.

zhCN: 血虎之疾
enGB: Tiger Blooded

zhCN: 当你使用虎爪击技时，你获得+3攻击加值。此外，你所有虎爪武技的豁免DC+1。
enGB: Increase your attack bonus by 3 when using Tiger Claw strikes. In addition you add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against your Tiger Claw maneuvers.

zhCN: 白鸦之御
enGB: White Raven Defense

zhCN: 当你的白鸦击技命中时，移除30尺范围内盟友的困惑、胁迫、情绪、恐惧、战栗以及影响心智的状态。此外，你所有白鸦武技的豁免DC+1。[目前没有白鸦流武技允许进行豁免检定]
enGB: On hitting with a White Raven strike removes the confused, compulsion, emotion, fear, shaken and mind affecting conditions from allies in a 30 feet radius. In addition you add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against your White Raven maneuvers. [Currently no White Raven strike allows a saving throw]

zhCN: 暗影之仪
enGB: Shadow Presence

zhCN: 当你处于影手战姿时，你的AC获得+2加值。此外，你所有影手武技的豁免DC+1。
enGB: While you are in a Shadow Hand stance you gain +2 AC. In addition you add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against your Shadow Hand maneuvers.

zhCN: 永恒之刹
enGB: Eternal Moment

zhCN: 当你的裂时击技命中时，你可以对同一生物进行一次免费攻击。此外，你所有裂时武技的豁免DC+1。
enGB: When you hit with a Riven Hourglass strike you can make a free attack against the same creature. In addition you add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against your Riven Hourglass maneuvers.

zhCN: 灼命之风
enGB: Relentless Sirocco

zhCN: 被你武器击中的生物必须进行一次意志豁免检定（DC 17），否则将在10轮内获得火焰易伤。此外，你所有漠风武技的豁免DC+1。
enGB: A creature struck by your weapon must make a will save (DC 17) or become vulnerable to fire for 10 rounds. In addition you add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against your Desert Wind maneuvers.

zhCN: 被你武器击中的生物必须进行一次意志豁免检定（DC 17），否则将在10轮内获得火焰易伤。
enGB: A creature struck by your weapon must make a will save (DC 17) or become vulnerable to fire for 10 rounds.

zhCN: 此生物具有火焰易伤。
enGB: This creature is vulnerable to fire.

zhCN: 军道之剑
enGB: Warblade

zhCN:
军道之剑生来就是为了战斗。迅速，强壮，持久并且对于战斗技巧的绝对自信，他寻找值得交战的对手来检验自己。对他而言，战斗是美丽的——那是生命悬于闪亮剑刃之上的完美瞬间。

除了所有近战职业都可以使用的常规武器攻击之外，军道之剑还能使用武技和应对技，并能进入战姿。武技是一种在效果上可以媲美魔法的特殊武器攻击。
应对技也类似，但需要对敌人的特定状态或动作做出反应。

军道之剑可以使用来自钢魂、铁心、石龙、虎爪和白鸦流派的武技。
在一级时，每场战斗中可以执行3个武技，随着军道之剑等级的提升，这个数字还会增加。在战斗中，可以通过“恢复武技”能力来恢复可用武技的数量。
enGB:
The warblade was born for conflict. Swift, strong, enduring, and utterly confident in his martial skills, he seeks to test himself against worthy foes. Battle is beautiful to him - a perfect moment in which life hangs suspended on the bright edge of a sword.

In addition to normal weapon attacks available to all martial classes warblades can perform maneuvers and counters as well as enter stances. Maneuvers are special weapon attack that rival magic in effect.
Counters are similar but react to specific conditions or actions performed by enemies.

Warblades have access to maneuvers from the Diamond Mind, Iron Heart, Stone Dragon, Tiger Claw and White Raven disciplines.
At level one 3 maneuvers can be performed per battle, this number increases as more warblades levels are taken. During battle the number of available maneuvers can be restored using the Recover Maneuvers ability.

zhCN: 军道之剑擅长
enGB: Warblade proficiencies

zhCN: 军道之剑擅长使用所有简易和军用近战武器（包括可当做投掷武器使用的武器）、轻甲、中甲以及盾牌（塔盾除外）。
enGB: You are proficient with simple and martial melee weapons (including those that can be used as thrown weapons), light and medium armor, and all shields except tower shields.

zhCN: 军道之剑武技选择
enGB: Warblade Maneuver Selection

zhCN: 在开始时军道之剑会习得3个武技。你可以选择的流派是钢魂，铁心，石龙，虎爪和白鸦。
enGB: You begin your career with knowledge of three martial maneuvers. The disciplines available to you are Diamond Mind, Iron Heart, Stone Dragon, Tiger Claw, and White Raven.

zhCN: 军道之剑战姿选择
enGB: Warblade Stance Selection

zhCN: 在开始时军道之剑会习得1种来自可选流派的一级战姿。。在第4，第10以及第16级你可以选择一个额外的战姿。不像武技，战姿永不耗竭且不需要准备。所有的已知战姿随时都可以使用，你可以用一个迅捷动作来改变你目前使用的战姿。除非在战姿描述中说明，否则战姿视为特异能力。
enGB: You begin with knowledge of one 1st level stance from any discipline open to warblades. At 4th, 10th, and 16th level, you can choose additional stances. Unlike maneuvers, stances are not expended, and you do not have to ready them. All the stances you know are available to you at all times, and you can change the stance you are currently using as a swift action. A stance is an extraordinary ability unless otherwise stated in the stance description.

zhCN: 如臂指使
enGB: Weapon Aptitude

zhCN: 军道之剑将其总军道等级-2作为其战士等级，以满足获得{g|Encyclopedia:Feat}专长{/g}的前置条件。如果其已有战士等级，则这些等级将叠加。
enGB: A Warblade counts his total Warblade level -2 as his fighter levels for the purpose of qualifying for {g|Encyclopedia:Feat}feats{/g}. If he has levels in fighter, these levels stack.

zhCN: 洞若观火
enGB: Battle Clarity (Reflex)

zhCN: 只要你不处于措手不及，你就会在反射豁免获得等同于智力调整值的洞察加值（最高等同于你的军道之剑等级）
enGB: As long as you are not flat-footed, you gain an insight bonus equal to your Intelligence bonus (maximum equals your warblade level) on your Reflex saves.

zhCN: 求战似渴
enGB: Battle Ardor

zhCN: 在确认重击的检定中，你获得等同于智力调整值的洞察加值
enGB: You gain an insight bonus equal to your Intelligence bonus on rolls made to confirm critical hits.

zhCN: 难知如阴
enGB: Battle Cunning

zhCN: 当你攻击措手不及或被夹击的敌人时，你在近战伤害检定中获得等同于智力调整值的洞察加值
enGB: You gain an insight bonus equal to your Intelligence bonus on melee damage rolls against flat-footed or flanked opponents.

zhCN: 百战精兵
enGB: Battle Skill

zhCN: 你的战技防御获得等同于智力调整值的洞察加值。
enGB: You gain an insight bonus equal to your Intelligence bonus Combat Maneuver Defense.

zhCN: 相机而动
enGB: Battle Mastery

zhCN: 当你进行借机攻击时，你将在攻击检定和伤害检定上获得等同于你智力调整值的洞察加值。
enGB: You gain an insight bonus equal to your Intelligence bonus on melee attack rolls and melee damage rolls made whenever you make an attack of opportunity.

zhCN: 融会贯通
enGB: Stance Mastery

zhCN: 20级时，你可以同时启用两种战姿
enGB: At 20th level, you can have two stances active simultaneously.

zhCN: 贤者之剑
enGB: Swordsage

zhCN: 作为武技的大师，贤者之剑是肉体的宗师——一名藉由九剑之道（Sublime Way）解锁了强大能力的剑之巫师，这些能力中有很多明显具备超自然或魔法的性质。根据所选修流派的不同，一名贤者之剑可能能够穿墙而过、跃起数十尺高、一触即碎巨石，甚至是掌握火焰或暗影的力量。无论其具体接受过何种训练，贤者之剑都模糊了纯粹武力与魔法技巧之间的界限。
enGB: A master of martial maneuvers, the sword sage is a physical adept — a blade wizard whose knowledge of the Sublime Way lets him unlock potent abilities, many of which are overtly supernatural or magical in nature. Depending on which disciplines he chooses to study, a swordsage might be capable of walking through walls, leaping dozens of feet into the air, shattering boulders with a single touch, or even mastering the elements of fire or shadow. Whatever his specific training, a swordsage blurs the line between martial prowess and magical skill.

zhCN: 贤者之剑擅长
enGB: Swordsage proficiencies

zhCN: 你擅长使用所有的简易和军用近战武器（包括那些可以作为投掷武器来使用的武器）以及轻甲，但不擅长盾牌。
enGB: You are proficient with simple, martial melee weapons (including those that can be used as thrown weapons) and light armor, but not shields.

zhCN: 冥想一轮以恢复所有武技点。
enGB: Meditate for a round to restores all maneuver points.

zhCN: 贤者之剑武技选择
enGB: Swordsage Maneuver Selection

zhCN: 在开始时贤者之剑会习得6个武技。你可以选择的流派是漠风、钢魂、落日、影手、石龙和虎爪。
enGB: You begin your career with knowledge of six martial maneuvers. The disciplines available to you are Desert Wind, Diamond Mind, Setting Sun, Shadow Hand, Stone Dragon and Tiger Claw.

zhCN: 贤者之剑战姿选择
enGB: Swordsage Stance Selection

zhCN:
在开始时贤者之剑会习得1种来自可选流派的1级战姿。在第2，第5，第9，第14以及第20级你可以选择一个额外的战姿。不像武技，战姿永不耗竭且不需要准备。所有的已知战姿随时都可以使用，你可以用一个迅捷动作来改变你目前使用的战姿。除非在战姿描述中说明，否则战姿视为特异能力。

除了所有近战职业都可以使用的常规武器攻击之外，贤者之剑还能使用武技和应对技，并能进入战姿。武技是一种在效果上可以媲美魔法的特殊武器攻击。
应对技也类似，但需要对敌人的特定状态或动作做出反应。

贤者之剑可以使用来自漠风、钢魂、落日、影手、石龙和虎爪流派的武技。
在一级时，每场战斗中可以执行4个武技，随着贤者之剑等级的提升，这个数字还会增加。在战斗中，可以通过“恢复武技”能力来恢复可用武技的数量。
enGB:
You begin with knowledge of one 1st level stance from any discipline open to swordsages. At 2nd, 5th, 9th, 14th, and 20th level, you can choose additional stances. Unlike maneuvers, stances are not expended, and you do not have to ready them. All the stances you know are available to you at all times, and you can change the stance you are currently using as a swift action. A stance is an extraordinary ability unless otherwise stated in the stance description.

In addition to normal weapon attacks available to all martial classes swordsages can perform maneuvers and counters as well as enter stances. Maneuvers are special weapon attack that rival magic in effect.
Counters are similar but react to specific conditions or actions performed by enemies.

Swordsages have access to maneuvers from the Desert Wind, Diamond Mind, Setting Sun, shadow Hand, Stone Dragon and Tiger Claw disciplines.
At level one 4 maneuvers can be performed per battle, this number increases as more swordsage levels are taken. During battle the number of available maneuvers can be restored using the Recover Maneuvers ability.

zhCN: 贤者之剑流派专攻选择
enGB: Swordsage Discipline Focus Selection

zhCN: 在1级时，选择一个贤者之剑可用的流派。你将获得该流派的专攻专长。
enGB: At level 1 choose a discipline available to Swordsages. You gain the Focus feat for that discipline.

zhCN: 动如脱兔
enGB: Quick to Act

zhCN: 你的先攻检定获得+1加值。此加值在第5，第10，第15以及第20级时再增加1。
enGB: You gain a +1 bonus on initiative checks. This bonus increases by 1 at 5th, 10th, 15th, and 20th level.

zhCN: 流转防御
enGB: Flowing Defense

zhCN: 只要你穿着轻甲并且不使用盾牌，你就可以将你的感知调整值作为加值加到防御等级（AC）上。这种AC加值在对抗接触攻击或者当你处于措手不及状态时也同样有效。但是在陷入无法移动或无助状态时则会失去此加值。
enGB: You can add your Wisdom modifier as a bonus to Armor Class, so long as you wear light armor and do not use a shield. This bonus to AC applies even against touch attacks or when you are flat-footed. However, you lose this bonus when you are immobilized or helpless.

zhCN: 剑之洞察
enGB: Sword Insight

zhCN: 只要你穿着轻甲并且不使用盾牌，你就可以将你的感知调整值作为攻击加值。
enGB: You can add your Wisdom modifier as an Attack Bonus, so long as you wear light armor and do not use a shield.

zhCN: 洞察之击
enGB: Insightful Strikes

zhCN: 你可以将你的感知调整值作为加值加到伤害检定上。
enGB: You can add your Wisdom modifier as a bonus on damage rolls.

zhCN: 防御战姿
enGB: Defensive Swordsage Stance

zhCN: 你在豁免检定中获得等同于你感知调整值的加值。
enGB: You gain a bonus to saving throws equal to your Wisdom Bonus.

zhCN: 战姿·侵掠如火
enGB: Punishing Stance

zhCN: 你所有的近战攻击都会额外造成1d6伤害。但在AC上承受-2减值。
enGB: You deal an extra 1d6 points of damage with all melee attacks and take a -2 penalty to AC.

zhCN:
流派：铁心
需求武术家等级：军道之剑 1
当你的对手斩向你毫无防备的腿部和侧面时，你狠狠的用你的武器迎面斩下，从你的战姿中获得额外的力量。当你处于此战姿下时，你所有的近战攻击都会额外造成1d6伤害。但在AC上承受-2减值，因为这是一个牺牲防御性来换取力量的战姿。
enGB:
Discipline: Iron Heart
Required Initiater Level: Warblade 1
You chop down violently with your weapon, lending extra force to your blows. These attacks come at a cost, as your enemies slash at your undefended legs and flanks. While you are in this stance, you deal an extra 1d6 points of damage with all melee attacks. You also take a -2 penalty to AC, because this fighting stance emphasizes power over a defensive posture.

zhCN: 钢筋铁骨
enGB: Stone Bones

zhCN:
流派：石龙
武技类别:击技
需求武术家等级：军道之剑 1 贤者之剑 1
当你使用此武技时，你将进行一次近战攻击，如果这次攻击命中，你获得DR5/精金，持续1轮。
enGB:
Discipline: Stone Dragon
Maneuver Type: Strike
Required Initiater Level: Warblade 1, Swordsage 1
When you use this maneuver, you make a single melee attack. If this attack hits, you gain damage reduction 5/adamantine for 1 round.

zhCN: 冲锋陷阵
enGB: Charging Minotaur

zhCN:
流派：石龙
武技类别:强化技
需求武术家等级：军道之剑 1 贤者之剑 1
此强化技使你能够在冲锋时进行一次冲撞攻击。移动和冲撞攻击都不会引发借机攻击。如常的处理这次冲撞尝试。如果你的力量检定结果超过对手的结果，你除了将目标击退正常距离外，还会造成相当于2d6+你的力量调整值的钝击伤害。假设你的力量检定足够高，你可以将目标击退超过 5尺（与冲撞的正常情况相同，但无需跟随）。
enGB:
Discipline: Stone Dragon
Maneuver Type: Boost
Required Initiator Level: Warblade 1, Swordsage 1
This boost enables you to make a bull rush attack as part of a charge. Neither the movement nor the bull rush attack provokes attacks of opportunity. Resolve the bull rush attempt normally. If your Strength check exceeds the opponents result, you deal bludgeoning damage equal to 2d6 + your Str modifier in addition to pushing the target back as normal. Assuming your Strength check is high enough, you can push your target back more than 5 feet (as normal for a bull rush, but without having to follow).

zhCN: 心无旁骛
enGB: Steely Strike

zhCN:
流派：铁心
武技类别:击技
需求武术家等级：军道之剑 1
作为此武技的一部分，你进行一次近战攻击。你在这次攻击检定上获得+4的加值，除你的攻击目标以外的敌人在对你的攻击检定上获得+4加值，持续1轮。
enGB:
Discipline: Iron Heart
Maneuver Type: Strike
Required Initiater Level: Warblade 1
You make a single melee attack as part of this strike. You gain a +4 bonus on the attack roll. All opponents other than the one you attacked gain a +4 bonus on attack rolls against you for 1 round.

zhCN: 梦魇剑·青玉
enGB: Sapphire Nightmare Blade

zhCN:
流派：钢魂
武技类别:击技
需求武术家等级：军道之剑 1 贤者之剑 1
作为此武技的一部分，你需要进行一次察觉检定。检定的DC等同目标生物的AC。然后对目标进行一次近战攻击，同样视为此武技的一部分。如果察觉检定成功，你造成额外1d6点伤害。如果察觉检定失败，那么此攻击的命中检定将受到-2的减值并造成正常伤害。
enGB:
Discipline: Diamond Mind
Maneuver Type: Strike
Required Initiator Level: Warblade 1, Swordsage 1
You attempt a Perception check as part of this maneuver, using the target creatures AC as the DC of the check. You then make a single melee attack against your target. The attack is also part of this maneuver. If your Perception check succeeds,  you deal an extra 1d6 points of damage. If your check fails, your attack is made with a -2 penalty and deals normal damage.

对每个相邻对手进行两次近战攻击，并在这些攻击检定中获得+4加值。每个被命中的目标都会承受正常的武器伤害。第一次命中会使目标陷入力竭2d4轮，第二次命中会使其陷入缓慢1d4轮。这两种效果都可以通过强韧豁免检定（DC= 17 + 你的感知调整值）将持续时间缩短至1轮。
enGB:
Discipline: Riven Hourglass
Maneuver Type: Strike
Required Initiator Level: Swordsage 13
Required Maneuvers: 2 Riven Hourglass
Make two melee attack rolls with a +4 bonus against each adjacent opponent. Each target hit, suffers weapon damage as normal. The first hit exhausts targets for 2d4 rounds, the second slows them for 1d4 rounds. Both effects can be resisted with a Fortitude save (DC 17 + your Wisdom modified) to reduce the duration to 1 round.
